sub_modules.fp_unpack: Combinational IEEE-754 single-precision operand unpacker and classifier. Extracts sign, exponent, fraction, effective exponent, significand, and zero/INF/NaN flags.
sub_modules.fp_special: Combinational special-case resolver for NaNs, infinities, signed zeros, and zero passthrough with the subtraction-adjusted B sign.
sub_modules.fp_align: Combinational exponent comparison and significand alignment block. Selects the larger-magnitude operand and right-shifts the smaller significand with sticky-bit generation.
sub_modules.fp_addsub: Combinational aligned significand adder/subtractor. Adds same-sign operands or subtracts opposite-sign operands and produces sign, exponent, and extended mantissa.
sub_modules.fp_normalize_round_pack: Combinational normalization, round-to-nearest-even, overflow/underflow handling, denormal packing, and IEEE-754 result packing block.
